info.english_meaning: to worship to pray to honor to respect
info.hindI_arTa: pUjA karanA arcanA karanA sammAna karanA

upasarga_meanings.meaning: uttama prakAra se Adara karanA acCI taraha se pUjA karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'nAradopi yayO svarge dAnavEH pratipUjitaH' (skandapu0 kedAra0 8630) **dAnavEH pratipUjitaH=dAnavEH pratyekaM pUjitaH
'pratipUjya yaTAnyAyamidaM vacanamabruvan' (manu0 11) manunA pUrvaM svAgatavacanenAsanadAnAdinA ca pUjitAH santastasya pUjAM kftvetyarTaH
